nodes.label: Comprehensive unit tests for Quick Research implementation.
Run async coroutine, handling nested event loop issues.
Create a ResearchSessionManager with temp DB.
Test that existing DB gets new columns via migration.
Test that default config values are used for content budget.
Test that custom config values override defaults.
Test that source content is truncated per source limit.
Test that total content is truncated across all sources.
Test that engine.run yields proper SSE events.
Test graceful handling when planning LLM fails.
Test review loop with issues then approval.
Integration tests for the full research pipeline.
Test full pipeline with mocked LLM and extractors.
Duplicate URLs only keep the first.
Wiki source type gets high score.
Gathering gate passes with enough sources.
Gathering gate fails with too few sources.
Analysis gate fails with low credibility.
Analysis gate passes with good credibility.
Synthesis gate passes with enough reinforced claims.
Synthesis gate fails with too many knowledge gaps.
Report gate passes with synthesis and sources.
